name: advisys-server
description: Express.js backend API for AdviSys academic consultation management system.

scripts.deploy: gcloud run deploy advisys-api --source . --region YOUR_REGION --project YOUR_PROJECT_ID --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.deploy:env: gcloud run deploy advisys-api --source . --region YOUR_REGION --project YOUR_PROJECT_ID --allow-unauthenticated --set-env-vars=DB_HOST=YOUR_DB_HOST,DB_PORT=3306,DB_USER=YOUR_DB_USER,DB_PASSWORD=YOUR_DB_PASSWORD,DB_NAME=YOUR_DB_NAME,JWT_SECRET=YOUR_JWT_SECRET,MAILJET_API_KEY=YOUR_MAILJET_API_KEY,MAILJET_API_SECRET=YOUR_MAILJET_API_SECRET,MAIL_FROM=no-reply@yourdomain.com,MAIL_FROM_NAME=AdviSys,APP_BASE_URL=https://your-frontend-domain,RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES=30,VERIFICATION_CODE_TTL_MINUTES=10,VERIFICATION_CODE_RESEND_SECONDS=60,VERIFICATION_MAX_PER_HOUR=5,FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=your-project-id,FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL=firebase-adminsdk@your-project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com,FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY=-----BEGIN%20PRIVATE%20KEY-----%5Cn...%5Cn-----END%20PRIVATE%20KEY-----

author: Jezreel D.
